title: GG'S HOUSE - 211info
text: GG'S HOUSE GG'S HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides blankets, a preselected bag of food, clothing, diapers, household items, cleaning supplies, and toiletries. Other items may be available when donations are received. Accepts donations of similar items and monetary donations. 1714 Pacific Avenue Forest Grove, OR 97116 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-1pm Email (503) 359-3871 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 359-3871 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, email, or visit website for more information. Speak with a volunteer to request specific items. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah, Washington, and Yamhill Counties Services: Bedding/Linen Cleaning Products Diapers Donation Drop Off Points Food Pantries General Clothing Provision Kitchenware Personal/Grooming Supplies If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
